title: MSc thesis: Grounding LLM Answers with Retrieval over Course Materials
description: Build and evaluate a retrieval-augmented assistant that answers student questions strictly from lecture materials, with a focus on citation faithfulness.

title: MSc thesis: Evaluating Multilingual Embedding Models on Swiss German
description: Benchmark sentence embedding models on dialectal Swiss German retrieval tasks and propose fine-tuning strategies.

title: BSc thesis: A Hallucination Test Suite for German Chatbots
description: Curate adversarial German prompts and build an automatic scorer for unsupported claims in chatbot answers.

title: MSc thesis: Early Detection of Coordinated Misinformation Campaigns
description: Detect coordinated inauthentic behaviour on social platforms using temporal graph features and weak supervision.

title: PhD position: Trustworthy Ranking Systems
description: Doctoral research on explainable and fair learning-to-rank, funded for four years, with applications to search and recommendation.

title: BSc thesis: Visualising Fraud Patterns in Transaction Graphs
description: Build an interactive visual analytics tool for temporal transaction graphs flagged by a GNN fraud detector.

title: MSc thesis: Federated Tumour Segmentation across Hospitals
description: Extend a federated learning pipeline for MRI tumour segmentation with client-drift correction and evaluate on multi-site data.

title: MSc thesis: Label-Efficient Histopathology Classification
description: Investigate self-supervised pretraining and active learning to cut annotation cost for rare cancer subtypes.

title: PhD position: Uncertainty-Aware Clinical Decision Support
description: Doctoral project on conformal prediction and calibration for bedside risk models, in collaboration with the university hospital.

title: MSc thesis: Safe Reinforcement Learning for Building Energy Control
description: Design an RL controller with formal safety constraints for HVAC systems and validate it in a high-fidelity simulator.

title: BSc thesis: Teaching a Robot Arm Simple Kitchen Tasks
description: Record human demonstrations and train an imitation learning policy for pick-and-place tasks on the lab's robot arm.

title: Masterarbeit: Kausale Effekte von Präventionsprogrammen in Krankenkassendaten
description: Schätzung kausaler Effekte eines Präventionsprogramms mit Target-Trial-Emulation auf Schweizer Abrechnungsdaten.

title: MSc thesis: Spatial Models for Cantonal Vaccination Coverage
description: Fit Bayesian hierarchical spatial models to vaccination registry data and communicate uncertainty to public health stakeholders.

title: MSc thesis: Auditing LLM Annotations of Parliamentary Debates
description: Systematically compare LLM-generated stance labels against expert annotations across the three Swiss national languages.

title: BSc thesis: A Dashboard for Polarisation Trends in News Comments
description: Build a dashboard visualising affective polarisation metrics computed from multilingual news comment embeddings.

title: MSc thesis: Diffusion Models for Alpine Precipitation Downscaling
description: Train and evaluate diffusion-based super-resolution models on climate simulation output for the Alpine region.

title: MSc thesis: Glacier Change Detection from Satellite Time Series
description: Develop a robust change-detection method for glacier outlines using Sentinel-2 time series and validate against field measurements.

title: PhD position: Fair Machine Learning in Education
description: Doctoral research on fairness-aware prediction and its long-term effects in educational settings, co-supervised with the school of education.

title: Bachelorarbeit: Übersetzungsqualität für Schweizerdeutsche Dialekte messen
description: Aufbau eines Evaluationsdatensatzes und automatischer Metriken für die Übersetzung schweizerdeutscher Dialekte ins Hochdeutsche.

title: MSc thesis: Privacy-Preserving Linkage of Cancer Registry Data
description: Implement and evaluate Bloom-filter based private record linkage for cantonal cancer registries, including a re-identification risk analysis.
